title: Pattern 1 — Tobacco: Indigenous Americas → global empire
description: Taíno Caribbean origin → Spanish + British colonial plantations (Chesapeake) → global diffusion → modern pharma-level industrialization.

title: Pattern 1 — Tobacco: Indigenous Americas → global empire
description: China — world's #1 producer today (43% of global).

title: Pattern 2 — Cannabis: Central Asian origin → colonial diffusion → prohibition → legalization
description: Hindu Kush origin → Silk Road + sacramental Hindu use → colonial Caribbean diffusion (Jamaica Rastafari) → 1937 US Prohibition → 2010s+ legalization wave.

title: Pattern 2 — Cannabis: Central Asian origin → colonial diffusion → prohibition → legalization
description: Canada — first G7 to fully legalize (2018).

title: Pattern 3 — Opioids: Sumerian medicine → British imperial weapon → pharma + fentanyl crisis
description: Sumerian 'hul gil' → Greek Hippocratic medicine → British Opium Wars against China → 1996 OxyContin → 500,000+ US overdose deaths.

title: Pattern 3 — Opioids: Sumerian medicine → British imperial weapon → pharma + fentanyl crisis
description: Afghanistan — 85% of world illicit opium pre-2022.

title: Pattern 4 — Coca: Andean sacred plant → colonial extraction fuel → pharma (Coca-Cola) → Drug War
description: Inca sacred plant → Potosí silver mine labor extraction → 1860 isolation of cocaine → 1886 Coca-Cola → 1999 Plan Colombia.

title: Pattern 4 — Coca: Andean sacred plant → colonial extraction fuel → pharma (Coca-Cola) → Drug War
description: Colombia — world's largest cocaine supplier despite $10B+ US aid.

title: Pattern 5 — Psychedelics: Indigenous ceremony → 20th-century ban → scientific renaissance
description: Huichol peyote pilgrimage → Mazatec María Sabina → LSD (Hofmann Basel 1938) → Schedule I 1970 → Johns Hopkins revival 2006+ → Oregon legal psilocybin 2023.

title: Pattern 5 — Psychedelics: Indigenous ceremony → 20th-century ban → scientific renaissance
description: Oregon — first legal US psilocybin services.

title: Pattern 6 — Khat: Ethiopian origin → Horn of Africa + Yemen daily economy → UK ban
description: Harar Ethiopia origin → Yemen (70% of water use) → Somali + Kenyan daily trade → UK 2014 ban disrupted diaspora economies.

title: Pattern 6 — Khat: Ethiopian origin → Horn of Africa + Yemen daily economy → UK ban
description: Yemen — khat as climate + food-security multiplier.

description: Washington DC — 1970 Controlled Substances Act + 1971 Nixon 'War on Drugs' declaration shapes global policy.

title: LAYER 3 — Modern Drug War + Policy Convergence
description: Geneva — UN 1961 Single Convention + 1971 Convention on Psychotropic Substances + 1988 Vienna Convention establish global prohibition framework.

title: LAYER 3 — Modern Drug War + Policy Convergence
description: Amsterdam — harm-reduction alternative model since 1976 coffeeshop policy.

title: LAYER 3 — Modern Drug War + Policy Convergence
description: Prague — Czechia decriminalized all drugs 2010; first EU country with across-the-board decriminalization.

description: Lisbon — Portugal decriminalized all drugs 2001; the most studied 'Portugal model' successful case for decrim + treatment.
